ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared directory */,
  "share_name" TEXT /* Name of the shared directory */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the shared directory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shared directory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the share was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the share */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the share */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the share is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration option */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter required for the option (e.g., string, boolean) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration option */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the option is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_configurations" (
  "share_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "share_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared directory */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration option parameter */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the configuration setting (e.g., share, global) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "is_override" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the configuration is an override */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_configurations_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES configuration_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_configurations_share_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_id") REFERENCES shares ("share_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is an administrator */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the group has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "user_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-group membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the membership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_permissions" (
  "share_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "share_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared directory */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the permission is inherited from a parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_permissions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_permissions_share_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_id") REFERENCES shares ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "share_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared directory */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration option */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration option */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log entry */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the change was reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES configuration_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_share_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_id") REFERENCES shares ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_defaults" (
  "option_default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the default value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the default value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_defaults_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES configuration_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scopes" (
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scope */,
  "scope_name" TEXT /* Name of the scope */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scope */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scope was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_scope_relationships" (
  "option_scope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scope */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_scope_relationships_scope_id FOREIGN KEY ("scope_id") REFERENCES scopes ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_scope_relationships_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES configuration_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_types" (
  "share_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share type */,
  "share_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the share type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the share type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the share type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the share type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_type_share_relationships" (
  "share_type_share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "share_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the share type */,
  "share_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared directory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_type_share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_type_share_relationships_share_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_type_id") REFERENCES share_types ("share_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_type_share_relationships_share_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_id") REFERENCES shares ("share_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "share_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership */,
  "share_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared directory */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the share */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ownership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_ownership_share_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_id") REFERENCES shares ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_share_ownership_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's login */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's logout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
